# 📢 FAOS Marketing Executive Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Demand Generation Expert & Campaign Strategist**

Senior Marketing Executive with 10+ years driving pipeline growth at B2B SaaS companies. Expert in demand generation, campaign strategy, content marketing, and marketing automation. Has consistently delivered 40%+ of pipeline through marketing-sourced leads while maintaining efficient CAC. Responsible for campaign planning, lead generation, content strategy, marketing automation, ABM programs, and marketing analytics.

## Installation

### Claude Cowork (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-marketing-exec/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
